<img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIzMDgiIGhlaWdodD0iODAiIHZpZXdCb3g9IjAgMCAzMDggODAiPjxyZWN0IHdpZHRoPSIxMDAlIiBoZWlnaHQ9IjEwMCUiIHN0eWxlPSJmaWxsOiNjZmQ0ZGI7ZmlsbC1vcGFjaXR5OiAwLjE7Ii8+PC9zdmc+" width="308" height="80" data-src="https://marn.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/Mada.png" loading="lazy" alt="Mada POS Payment Saudi Marn" class="case-study-logo"><h1 class="medium-heading">“The national infrastructure enabling modern electronic payment technologies for everyone.”<strong><br></strong></h1><div><div class="handwriting">Ziad Al Yousef</div><div>CEO- Saudi Payments</div></div></div><div class="content-width-large">
<img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIxMjAwIiBoZWlnaHQ9IjY3MiIgdmlld0JveD0iMCAwIDEyMDAgNjcyIj48cmVjdCB3aWR0aD0iMTAwJSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxMDAlIiBzdHlsZT0iZmlsbDojY2ZkNGRiO2ZpbGwtb3BhY2l0eTogMC4xOyIvPjwvc3ZnPg==" width="1200" height="672" data-src="https://marn.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/ElUjSCSVkAI3XLP.jpeg" loading="lazy" alt="Mada POS Payment Saudi Marn"></div></div></div></div></div><div class="color-background lightblueshgrey"><div class="section"><div class="container"><div class="w-layout-grid sidebar-layout case-study-layout"><div class="sidebar"><div class="card shadow-small"><ul role="list" class="w-list-unstyled"><li class="card-body border-bottom"><h6 class="h6-small-2 no-bottom-space">
Company</h6><div>Mada</div></li><li class="card-body border-bottom"><h6 class="h6-small-2 no-bottom-space">
Location</h6><div>Saudi Arabia</div></li><li class="card-body border-bottom"><h6 class="h6-small-2 no-bottom-space">
Fees</h6><div>Free</div></li><li class="card-body border-bottom"><h6 class="h6-small-2 no-bottom-space">
Industry</h6><div>Payment</div></li><li class="card-body"><h6 class="h6-small-2 no-bottom-space">
Website</h6>
<a href="https://www.mada.com.sa/en" class="link">
mada.com.sa/                      </a></li></ul></div></div><div class="row justify-content-center"><div class="content-width-large"><div class="article w-richtext"><p>The Saudi Payments Network or mada (formerly SPAN) is the only and major payment system in the kingdom of Saudi Arabia established by Ministry of Finance under the supervision of Saudi Central Bank.<br />
It connects all ATM and Point of Sale (PoS) terminals throughout the country to a central payment switch which in turn re-routes the financial transactions to the card issuer (local bank, Visa, American Express or MasterCard).<br />
All banks in Saudi Arabia are required by the Saudi Central Bank (SAMA) to issue ATM cards fully compatible with the network. All services are provided to the customer free of charge, regardless of the ATM used, its operator, or the customer’s card issuer.</p><p>Mada provides its services through over than 17,000 ATM machines and over 225,000 POS terminals in the Kingdom. In cooperation with global payment systems such as Visa, MasterCard, and Maestro, mada allows access to millions of ATMs and POS terminals worldwide.[2]</p></div><div class="article w-richtext"><figure style="max-width:1224px" id="w-node-4db09639187c-0b602324" class="w-richtext-align-fullwidth w-richtext-figure-type-image"><div>

Develop your relationship with the customer directly by reviewing their data, opinions and the movement of their requests.</p><p>Seamlessly integrate with other systems like payment, delivery and other services without additional technical costs.</p><p>Get technical solutions to help you develop your business and save a lot of money: the website, smart phone application, <span id="searchHighlight1" class="MyAppHighlight">order</span> reception system, driver management system, call center system, and a lot more to come.</p></div><div class="article w-richtext"><figure style="max-width:1224px" id="w-node-4db09639187c-0b602324" class="w-richtext-align-fullwidth w-richtext-figure-type-image"><div>
<img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIxMDE4IiBoZWlnaHQ9IjcyMSIgdmlld0JveD0iMCAwIDEwMTggNzIxIj48cmVjdCB3aWR0aD0iMTAwJSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxMDAlIiBzdHlsZT0iZmlsbDojY2ZkNGRiO2ZpbGwtb3BhY2l0eTogMC4xOyIvPjwvc3ZnPg==" width="1018" height="721" data-src="https://marn.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/2.png" loading="lazy" alt="Tryorder.online"></div></figure><p>‍</p><div><p><b>Features</b></p><ul><li><b>An Application For Your Restaurant:</b><br />
A special application for your restaurant compatible with iOS and Android. You can adjust the colors to match your brand.</li><li><b>Immediate Activation:</b><br />
Register now, get your website, and start receiving your customers’ requests. You will not need to wait for your account to be activated.</li><li><b>Connecting With Delivery Companies:</b><br />
You can link with the most powerful express delivery companies. If you do not have a delivery service, activate it and open new sales points.</li><li><b>Multilingual:</b><br />
The program supports Arabic and English languages.</li><li><b>Various Payment Options:</b><br />
Include the needed payment options such as credit card, MADA, or Apple Pay.</li><li><b>Delivery & Pick-Up:</b><br />
Offer your customers the ability to request delivery or pick-up from the branch or pick-up from the car.</li><li><b>Manage Food Menus:</b><br />
